untranslatable_reason: Signal requires inter-commodity spread analysis (old crop vs new crop price convergence) which cannot be expressed using single-instrument indicators. The core logic involves: (1) monitoring spread narrowing between two different futures contracts, (2) detecting relative velocity of price changes between instruments, and (3) identifying convergence to carrying charge limits. These multi-leg spread mechanics are not representable with the allowed single-price indicators.
translation_notes: This is a spread trading signal (short old crop, long new crop) that requires tracking two separate commodity contracts simultaneously. The allowed indicators only support single-instrument analysis. A proper translation would require spread-specific indicators like: spread_price, spread_momentum, spread_convergence_rate, or inter-contract correlation metrics. The attempted translation above uses a proxy with SMA crossover, but this does not capture the actual signal logic of crop cycle supply uncertainty and carrying charge dynamics.
